hooks.command: rm -f .agentpack/.context_injected .agentpack/.mcp_reminded && ([ -f .agentpack/session.json ] && agentpack session refresh >/dev/null 2>&1 || agentpack pack --task auto --mode balanced >/dev/null 2>&1) &

python3 -c "
import json, pathlib, subprocess
snap = pathlib.Path('.agentpack/snapshots/latest.json')
sentinel = pathlib.Path('.agentpack/.mcp_reminded')
current_hash = __import__('hashlib').md5(snap.read_bytes()).hexdigest() if snap.exists() else None
reminded_hash = sentinel.read_text().strip() if sentinel.exists() else None
if current_hash != reminded_hash:
    subprocess.Popen(['agentpack', 'pack', '--task', 'auto', '--mode', 'balanced'],
                     stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL)
    sentinel.write_text(current_hash or '1')
    msg = 'AgentPack: repo changed — repacking index. Call agentpack_pack_context(task=\"...\") for fresh context.'
else:
    msg = 'AgentPack MCP ready. Call agentpack_pack_context(task=\"...\") before editing files.'
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'UserPromptSubmit',
    'additionalContext': msg}}))
"
